title: feuilleea micrantha
intro: Feuilleea micrantha, also known as Japanese angelica tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Feuilleea micrantha can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
